mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (user_uuid, username, password, nickname, avatar_url, email, is_delete, status, update_time, update_user, create_time, create_user) VALUES (#{user_uuid}, #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar_url}, #{email}, #{is_delete}, #{status}, #{update_time}, #{update_user}, #{create_time}, #{create_user})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_uuid, username, password, nickname, avatar_url, email, is_delete, status FROM tb_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT user_id, user_uuid, username, password, nickname, avatar_url, email, is_delete, status FROM tb_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_delete = 0
